workflow_summary: Route every bounded Soulforge development result through a risk-tiered closing review so deterministic validation, boundary inspection, value judgment, and optional B/V verification are recorded before a change is accepted, revised, blocked, or escalated to the owner.
scenario_facts: one level-2 judge decision is needed
one knowledge trigger result is metadata_only_record
boundary_policy: Do not claim tool use, file edits, runtime paths, or hidden private evidence.
Do not mutate upstream artifacts or promote stronger source/canon authority than the contract supports.
